title: tecoma grandiflora var. thunbergii
intro: Tecoma grandiflora var. thunbergii, also known as the Yellow Bells or Trumpet Vine, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tecoma grandiflora var. thunbergii include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal remedies.
